content: From strategy to implementation, Slalom helps businesses unlock the full potential of AI—driving innovation, efficiency, and measurable results.
Key findings from Slalom’s AI Research Report
Steps to scale AI and deliver real business impact
Rethink the future of marketing with modular strategies, nonlinear customer journeys, AI-powered personalization, and digital experience design that drives growth.
See how we helped Renown Health rebuild patient access, creating an experience that’s digital when you want, human when you prefer.
See how a technical service leader in the video game industry turned untapped data into stronger insights, publisher support, and new levels of player engagement.
From quick fixes to long-term value—see what happens when contact centers are built for connection, not containment.
Explore how today’s leaders are building future-ready orgs with short cycles, smarter metrics, stronger data, and hands-on leadership.
See how a Snowflake data mart is helping Multnomah County fight homelessness with clear insights, better services, and stronger funding.
Discover how Slalom and Protas revolutionised clinical trials with Cantata, reducing costs tenfold and improving patient safety.
Find out how c-suite leaders are learning from past technology implementations and reinventing their organizations for the future.
We’ve come back to Slalom for multiple different engagements because we’ve been really pleased with the caliber of resources and the fit with the project team.
I very much enjoyed partnering with the Slalom team. The mix of digital expertise, delivery focus, and client-focused culture contributed directly to our accelerated digital journey.
The general sentiment across the team is that Slalom has helped everyone level up. This company is one of the best consulting firms that they’ve worked with in their careers.

Not only did Slalom help us build the foundation for one of our core enterprise goals—a holistic, well-defined culture—it informed executive conversations around strategy and fostered engagement from our teams around the world.
Every day we bring our heads and our hearts to being a trusted copilot, respectful challenger, and unwavering champion for each of our customers.

From strategy to digital product building and beyond, we bring the right mix of services to accelerate your vision with holistic, practical solutions. We listen deeply and share our knowledge every step of the way, empowering your teams to continue the momentum after we’re gone.
We have rich experience and proven results in your industry. We also share insights across industries to help you uncover new opportunities to adapt and disrupt.
Together with over 700 leading and emerging technology partners, we innovate and co-create to deliver the best ideas and solutions for you.
